title: policy_router_input_schema
description: Policy Router 최상위 입력 래퍼(wrapper) 스키마 - 라우팅 메타데이터와 순수 상태 컨텍스트 분리

source_node_id.description: 이벤트를 발생시킨 센서 노드, 게이트웨이, 혹은 입력 경로 식별자

audit_correlation_id.description: 로그, validator, actuator feedback을 하나의 이벤트 체인으로 묶는 상관관계 ID

ingest_timestamp_ms.description: 게이트웨이 또는 라우터가 이벤트를 관측한 시각 (추적, 정렬, 로컬 안전 fallback 판단 용도)

network_status.description: 로컬 연결 상태를 나타내며, LLM 해석에는 사용되지 않고 안전 fallback에만 사용됨

experiment_mode.description: Optional experiment mode for Package A intent-recovery comparison. Field is honored only by experiment runners and the Class 1 intent-recovery branch; it must not be passed into the LLM prompt and does not affect Class 0 emergency, Class 2 escalation, or validator authority.

class2_candidate_source_mode.description: Optional experiment mode for Package A Class 2 candidate-generation comparison (10_llm_class2_integration_alignment_plan.md §3.3 P2.3). 'static_only' forces Class2ClarificationManager to skip the LLM and use _DEFAULT_CANDIDATES; 'llm_assisted' is the current default behaviour (LLM with static fallback). Like experiment_mode, this is honored only by experiment runners and the Class 2 candidate-generation branch; it must not be passed into the LLM prompt and does not affect Class 0 emergency, Class 1 routing, or validator authority.

class2_scan_ordering_mode.description: Optional experiment mode for Package A scanning-order comparison (12_class2_scanning_input_mode_plan.md §14). 'source_order' (default) keeps candidate order as produced by the candidate-source layer (static defaults or LLM). 'deterministic' applies class2_scan_ordering_rules from policy to permute the candidate order before scanning announces option 0. Honored only by Class2ClarificationManager when input_mode='scanning'; never enters the LLM prompt and does not affect Class 0 / Class 1 routing or validator authority. Independent of class2_candidate_source_mode — the two compose so paper-eval can isolate ordering contribution from generation contribution.

pure_context_payload.description: LLM 프롬프트 조합에 전달 가능한 유일한 순수 컨텍스트
